summary: iter264.1 Phase 1 Testing - Permissions Matrix, Time-Window Filtering, New Role Profiles. Backend: 25/25 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: IRD Builder works correctly. ISSUE: Admin Onboarding Permissions tab not accessible via sidebar (sidebar points to wrong panel).

integration_issues.issue: Sidebar entry 'Admin & Onboarding' has panelId='admin-command' instead of 'admin-onboarding'. The Permissions tab in AdminOnboarding module is not accessible via sidebar navigation.

action_items: Fix sidebar entry: Change 'Admin & Onboarding' panelId from 'admin-command' to 'admin-onboarding' in /app/client/components/site/Sidebar.tsx
critical_code_review_comments: Permissions Matrix backend implementation is correct - CDC cannot publish (ird.publish=false)
Time-window filtering works correctly - sections/items outside their window are hidden
All 7 new role profiles (execchefbqts, cdc, bqtsales, sales, artmedia, opscontrol, accounting) login successfully with Welcome2026!
IRD Builder UI has proper input visibility with CSS hardening in aurion-theme-bridge.css
Preview tab correctly shows iframe of public guest page

success_rate.frontend: 90% (IRD Builder works, Permissions tab not accessible via sidebar)

test_credentials.new_profiles: execchefbqts@luccca.com, cdc@luccca.com, bqtsales@luccca.com, sales@luccca.com, artmedia@luccca.com, opscontrol@luccca.com, accounting@luccca.com - all use Welcome2026!

seed_data_creation: Test permission overrides created and restored during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter264.1 Phase 1 backend fully tested. Permissions Matrix API works correctly. Frontend IRD Builder works. CRITICAL: Fix sidebar to point to admin-onboarding panel to enable Permissions tab access. After fix, verify: (1) Navigate to Admin & Onboarding, (2) Click Permissions tab, (3) Verify CDC row shows ird.publish=false, (4) Test toggle functionality.

ird_time_window_filtering.PUT /api/ird-builder/menu new fields: PASS - available_from, available_until, count_remaining, lead_time_hours accepted

frontend.IRD Builder tabs: PASS - all 6 tabs present (builder, amenities, import, preview, qr, orders)
frontend.IRD input visibility: PASS - text clearly visible in inputs
frontend.IRD time inputs: PASS - section time pickers render (06:00 AM - 11:00 AM for Breakfast)
frontend.Admin Onboarding Permissions tab: FAIL - not accessible via sidebar (wrong panelId)
